D:\soft\cmake\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\mud_client.dir/objects.a
D:\soft\MSY32\ucrt64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\mud_client.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\mud_client.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\soft\MSY32\ucrt64\bin\c++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\mud_client.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o mud_client.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libmud_client.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\mud_client.dir\linkLibs.rsp
